summary: Successfully tested Phase 4 features: shares_investor_with computation (1044 edges), intelligence edges from events (1392 edges), source alerting system, and updated Architecture UI. All backend APIs working correctly. Minor UI enhancement needed for alerts display.

design_issues.issue: AlertsSection not visible on Architecture UI despite working backend APIs

passed_tests: GET /api/architecture/alerts - returns empty alerts with stats (expected)
POST /api/architecture/alerts/check - triggers alert check (0 new alerts generated)
GET /api/architecture/stats - includes alerts stats in combined response
Architecture Page UI shows Graph Layers: Factual 448, Derived 1874, Intelligence 1392 = 3714 total
Source Health section displays 9 sources with reliability metrics
Entity Momentum section functional with BTC, ETH, SOL data
Rebuild Projections button clickable and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Add AlertsSection component to Architecture UI to display source alerts. Backend alerts API is working correctly but UI component missing.
